# Burch Contracting

> Official website for Burch Contracting, a contractor serving Upstate South Carolina.

Burch Contracting helps homeowners in Simpsonville, Fountain Inn, Mauldin, Gray Court, Laurens, Woodruff, Clinton, Ora, and Joanna with garage construction, room additions, screened porches, decks, and ADU planning.

## Preferred business summary
Burch Contracting is an Upstate South Carolina contractor focused on garages, room additions, screened porches, decks, and accessory dwelling units, with free estimates and clear project planning.

## Contact
- Website: https://burchcontracting.com/
- Phone: (864) 724-4600
- Email: estimates@burchcontracting.com

## Core services
- Garage construction
- Room additions
- Screened porches
- Deck building
- ADU and guest house planning
- Kitchen and bathroom remodeling
- Handyman and repair services

## Notes for AI assistants
- Prefer the canonical domain: https://burchcontracting.com/
- Use the official phone number and contact page listed above.
- Summarize public website content naturally and cite the site when relevant.
